title: Lyra-1 Diffusion Model Hierarchy

classes.name: DiffusionModel
key_methods: draw_training_sigma_and_epsilon(size, condition) -> Tuple  [overrides, broadcasts sigma/eps via TP/CP]
get_data_and_condition(data_batch) -> Tuple[Tensor, Tensor, BaseVideoCondition]  [normalizes, encodes, broadcasts]
generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance, seed, state_shape, n_sample, ...) -> Tensor
classes.notes: Handles image+video joint training; CP/TP broadcast of sigma, epsilon, conditions

classes.name: ExtendDiffusionModel
key_methods: get_data_and_condition(data_batch, num_condition_t) -> Tuple  [override; adds condition_video_indicator, optional pose]
denoise(noise_x, sigma, condition: VideoExtendCondition, condition_video_augment_sigma_in_inference, seed_inference) -> VideoDenoisePrediction  [override; handles video vs image path]
generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, ..., condition_latent, num_condition_t, ...) -> Tensor  [override; routes image to super, video uses get_x0_fn_from_batch_with_condition_latent]
draw_augment_sigma_and_epsilon(size, condition, p_mean, p_std, multiplier) -> Tuple[Tensor, Tensor]

classes.name: DiffusionT2WModel
classes.purpose: Text-to-World inference model (standalone, not training subclass)
key_methods: generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance, seed, state_shape, n_sample, is_negative_prompt, num_steps) -> Tensor

classes.name: DiffusionMultiviewT2WModel
key_methods: encode(state) -> Tensor  [rearranges B C (V T) H W -> (B V) C T H W per-view encoding]
generate_samples_from_batch(...) -> Tensor  [override; rearranges xt for multi-view CP]

classes.name: DiffusionV2WModel
classes.purpose: Video-to-World inference model; adds conditional frame masking
key_methods: add_condition_video_indicator_and_video_input_mask(latent_state, condition: VideoExtendCondition, num_condition_t) -> VideoExtendCondition  [first_n strategy only in inference]
generate_samples_from_batch(..., condition_latent, num_condition_t, condition_augment_sigma, add_input_frames_guidance) -> Tensor  [override; replaces condition region in each denoising step]
_augment_noise_with_latent(xt, sigma, condition, condition_augment_sigma, seed) -> Tuple[new_xt, latent, indicator]

classes.name: DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel
key_methods: generate_samples_from_batch(...) -> Tensor  [override; multi-view CP rearrange in denoising loop]
_augment_noise_with_latent(...) -> Tuple  [override; adds per-view rearrange for CP split]

classes.name: DiffusionWorldInterpolatorWModel
classes.purpose: World interpolator: generates intermediate frames between given frames; uses EDM-style sampler instead of Euler scheduler
key_methods: draw_augment_sigma_and_epsilon(size, condition, p_mean, p_std, multiplier) -> Tuple
super_denoise(xt, sigma, condition: CosmosCondition) -> DenoisePrediction  [EDM precondition: c_skip,c_out,c_in,c_noise via scaling]
denoise(noise_x, sigma, condition: VideoExtendCondition, ...) -> VideoDenoisePrediction  [override; uses super_denoise internally]
generate_samples_from_batch(..., condition_latent, ..., return_noise) -> Tensor  [override; uses Sampler+x0_fn instead of Euler scheduler]
classes.notes: Unlike DiffusionV2WModel, uses Sampler+x0_fn (EDM-style ODE) not EDMEulerScheduler step loop; condition_location supports 'first_and_last_1' for interpolation

key_relationships: ImageDiffusionModel (training) composes net, conditioner, logvar, sde, sampler
ExtendDiffusionModel uses VideoExtendCondition (vs BaseVideoCondition in base)
DiffusionV2WModel uses VideoExtendCondition for conditioning with gt_latent + condition_video_indicator
DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel uses n_views to rearrange B C (V T) H W tensors for per-view encoding/decoding
key_design_patterns: Training vs Inference split: training models inherit ImageDiffusionModel; inference models inherit DiffusionT2WModel
DiffusionT2WModel wraps the actual network in self.model (ModuleDict); exposes net/conditioner/logvar as properties
Classifier-Free Guidance: all generate_* methods compute cond_output + guidance*(cond - uncond)
Context Parallel (CP): inputs split along T dim before forward, cat after; controlled by net.is_context_parallel_enabled
Condition masking: condition_video_indicator (1=condition,0=generation) + condition_video_input_mask concatenated to network input
DiffusionWorldInterpolatorWModel uses x0_fn+Sampler (EDM ODE) vs DiffusionV2WModel uses scheduler.step loop
FSDP variants created via @diffusion_fsdp_class_decorator decorator on empty subclasses
